instructionalDaysDescription: The official 2026-2027 Spotsylvania instructional calendar lists 179 student days.
seoTitle: Spotsylvania County School Calendar 2026-2027: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Find the Spotsylvania County school calendar for the 2026-2027 school year with first day, holidays, breaks, teacher workdays, printable PDF, and calendar download.
calendarNotes: Spotsylvania County Public Schools starts the 2026-2027 school year with transition day on August 10, followed by the first day of school on August 11. Fall Break runs November 23-27, Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, Spring Break runs March 22-26, and the last day of school is May 28, 2027. SCPS also publishes a separate 2026-2027 A/B Day Instructional Calendar, and families can download the official PDF or import reviewed dates into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Spotsylvania County school start in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spotsylvania County Public Schools starts school for all students on Tuesday, August 11, 2026. The calendar also lists transition day on Monday, August 10, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Spotsylvania County Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break on the 2026-2027 SCPS calendar runs Monday, March 22 through Friday, March 26, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Spotsylvania County in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Friday, May 28, 2027, and it is listed as an early release day.

calendarFaqs.q: Does SCPS have a 2026-2027 A/B day calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. SCPS publishes a separate 2026-2027 A/B Day Instructional Calendar PDF. This page summarizes the main instructional calendar.

calendarFaqs.q: Is August 11, 2026 the first day of school in Spotsylvania County?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Tuesday, August 11, 2026 is the first day of school on the Spotsylvania County Public Schools 2026-2027 instructional calendar. Transition day is Monday, August 10.

calendarFaqs.q: How many instructional days are in the SCPS 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The official Spotsylvania County Public Schools 2026-2027 instructional calendar lists 179 student days.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the Spotsylvania school calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the official PDF link on this page to open the Spotsylvania County Public Schools 2026-2027 instructional calendar. MySchoolDates also provides an unofficial one-time .ics import generated from the reviewed dates.

calendarFaqs.q: Can I add the Spotsylvania school calendar to Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Download the unofficial Spotsylvania County .ics file from MySchoolDates and import it into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook. It is a one-time import and does not automatically update if SCPS revises the calendar.

yearNumbers.label: Student Days
yearNumbers.detail: The official calendar lists 179 student days for 2026-2027.

yearNumbers.label: Conference Nights
yearNumbers.detail: The calendar lists high, middle, and elementary conference nights in October, January, and March/April.

yearNumbers.label: A/B Calendar
yearNumbers.detail: SCPS publishes the A/B Day Instructional Calendar separately from the main instructional calendar.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break runs Monday through Friday and includes Easter on March 26.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2025-2026 Calendar
content: The first day moves from August 12 in 2025 to August 11 in 2026.
Spring Break moves from March 30-April 3 in 2026 to March 22-26 in 2027.
The calendar adds open house, back-to-school night, and conference night dates by school level.
